sources.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
sources.caveat: benchmark framing from creator; external replication still needed

sources.title: LABBench2: An Improved Benchmark for AI Systems for Biology
sources.caveat: not peer reviewed at time of capture

sources.title: From Data to Animal Health: Building Benchmarks for AI-Driven Veterinary Innovation
sources.caveat: award page describes project; final benchmark outputs may be separate or unpublished

privacy_status.allowed_reuse_scope: Reusable for public research-memory gate design and synthetic CI tests only.
privacy_status.privacy_risk: Low; no personal, clinical, veterinary case, or account data included.

missingness: External curator reconstruction test not yet run.
No measured comparison against ordinary research notes yet.
Animal-health benchmark output availability remains unresolved.
revision_reason: Add workflow-stage evidence requirements before scientific or medical-adjacent claims can enter reusable memory.
falsification_route: Reject or revise this gate if packets fail to improve reconstruction accuracy, blocked-inference detection, or next-action clarity in curator testing.
next_executable_action: Run the included regression test script and then add one real research note candidate as a blinded fixture.

translation_boundary.to_context: Mirror Cartographer reusable discovery-memory promotion rules
translation_boundary.bridge_evidence: Multiple frontier sources require realistic workflow, provenance, validation, continuity, or benchmark infrastructure rather than isolated answer scoring.
blocked_transfer: Do not infer clinical usefulness from benchmark success alone.
Do not infer veterinary case applicability from human clinical AI benchmarks.
Do not infer mechanism or cure from workflow completion without experimental validation.

validation_route: Validate packet structure with the local CLI.
Test invalid fixtures for missing validation route and unknown privacy in implemented packets.
Run curator reconstruction study comparing gated packets to ordinary notes.
blocked_inferences: This does not prove a cure, mechanism, or intervention works.
provenance_route: Fresh frontier scan captured public sources.
Source map converted into design implication.
Design implication implemented as schema, validator, fixtures, and tests.
